3c Wallpapers

February 3, 2004

graphic designentertainment

3c 3hree Celebrities of the year. Computer wallpaper artwork.

1). Svetlana Surganova is very powerful and talented singer, violinist, guitarist and composer. She just parted Russians famous band Nochnie Sniperi (tranlation: Night Snipers) and started her solo career. Sveta's band official page: surganova.su.
Download your resolution: 1028x1024, 1024x768, 800x600, 640x480

2). Allison Lange is young actress who lives and works in Hollywood, California. She has become famous by playing lead rode in Christinas House, and playing no so much leading role in TV-series Roswell. Her latest role is 2003 movie Gacy. Allison's Mini Site: allisonlange.info.
Download your resolution: 1028x1024, 1024x768, 800x600, 640x480

3). Olesya Sudzilovskaya is talented Russian actress who has proved herself very promising young star still having very fresh portfolio. Olesya's Official web site: sudzilovskaya.ru.
Download your resolution: 1028x1024, 1024x768, 800x600, 640x480
